title: 和平发展
subtitle: Peaceful Development, Global Peace, Conflict Resolution
assistant_message: Learn to discuss peaceful development, global peace initiatives, and conflict resolution strategies.

examples.chinese: 通过对话与合作来解决国际争端。
examples.translation: Resolve international disputes through dialogue and cooperation.
examples.translation_id: Selesaikan perselisihan internasional melalui dialog dan kerja sama.

examples.chinese: 和平发展不仅有利于各国，而且有利于全人类。
examples.translation: Peaceful development is not only beneficial to all countries but also to all humanity.
examples.translation_id: Pembangunan damai tidak hanya bermanfaat bagi semua negara tetapi juga bagi seluruh umat manusia.

examples.chinese: 正如战争带来破坏一样，和平带来繁荣。
examples.translation: Just as war brings destruction, peace brings prosperity.
examples.translation_id: Sama seperti perang membawa kehancuran, perdamaian membawa kemakmuran.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Kang Wei
dialogue.chinese: 通过对话与合作来解决国际争端。你觉得国际社会在这方面做得如何？
dialogue.pinyin: Tōngguò duìhuà yǔ hézuò lái jiějué guójì zhēngduān. Nǐ juéde guójì shèhuì zài zhè fāngmiàn zuò dé rúhé?
dialogue.translation: Resolve international disputes through dialogue and cooperation. How do you think the international community is doing in this regard?
dialogue.translation_id: Selesaikan perselisihan internasional melalui dialog dan kerja sama. Bagaimana menurut Anda kinerja masyarakat internasional dalam hal ini?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Pei Hua
dialogue.chinese: 和平发展不仅有利于各国，而且有利于全人类。但实现和平需要各方的共同努力。
dialogue.pinyin: Hépíng fāzhǎn bùjǐn yǒulì yú gèguó, érqiě yǒulì yú quán rénlèi. Dàn shíxiàn hépíng xūyào gèfāng de gòngtóng nǔlì.
dialogue.translation: Peaceful development is not only beneficial to all countries but also to all humanity. But achieving peace requires joint efforts from all parties.
dialogue.translation_id: Pembangunan damai tidak hanya bermanfaat bagi semua negara tetapi juga bagi seluruh umat manusia. Namun mencapai perdamaian membutuhkan upaya bersama dari semua pihak.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Kang Wei
dialogue.chinese: 如何平衡国家利益和全球和平？
dialogue.pinyin: Rúhé pínghéng guójiā lìyì hé quánqiú hépíng?
dialogue.translation: How to balance national interests and global peace?
dialogue.translation_id: Bagaimana menyeimbangkan kepentingan nasional dan perdamaian global?

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Pei Hua
dialogue.chinese: 正如战争带来破坏一样，和平带来繁荣。相互尊重、合作共赢是实现和平发展的关键。
dialogue.pinyin: Zhèngrú zhànzhēng dài lái pòhuài yīyàng, hépíng dài lái fánróng. Xiānghù zūnzhòng, hézuò gòngyíng shì shíxiàn hépíng fāzhǎn de guānjiàn.
dialogue.translation: Just as war brings destruction, peace brings prosperity. Mutual respect and win-win cooperation are the keys to achieving peaceful development.
dialogue.translation_id: Sama seperti perang membawa kehancuran, perdamaian membawa kemakmuran. Saling menghormati dan kerja sama saling menguntungkan adalah kunci untuk mencapai pembangunan damai.

exercises.question: What does 和平发展 (hépíng fāzhǎn) mean?
How to say 'win-win cooperation' in Chinese?
Complete: 和平发展不仅有利于各国，______有利于全人类。
